title: acacia aspera subsp. aspera
intro: Acacia aspera subsp. aspera, also known as the Australian prickly acacia or cat's claw acacia, is a perennial shrub or small tree native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acacia aspera subsp. aspera include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Acacia aspera subsp. aspera can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
